id: get-studio-statistics
title: "Get Studio Statistics"
description: "Get Studio statistics, such as the number of devices, automations, spaces, scenes, etc."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Studio Statistics"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/studio/statistics"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get Studio statistics, such as the number of devices, automations, spaces, scenes, etc.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"dimensions","in":"query","description":"List of statistical dimensions. Supported values: deviceCount (number of devices), linkageCount (number of automations), spaceCount (number of spaces), sceneCount (number of scenes). Example URL: dimensions=deviceCount,linkageCount,spaceCount,sceneCount or dimensions=deviceCount&dimensions=linkageCount","required":true,"schema":{"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"string","description":"Studio statistics dimension","enum":["deviceCount","linkageCount","spaceCount","sceneCount"],"title":"StudioStatisticsDimension"}},"style":"form","explode":true,"example":["deviceCount","linkageCount","spaceCount","sceneCount"]}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
